response.overview: The story of Kamal who is willing to do anything for Kasih and Aiman. His soul is in turmoil when he learns of the loss of his children. But what can he do when he is separated by prison walls. Kamal is imprisoned for a corruption charge that was orchestrated by his wife, Marlia. Marlia traps her husband because she wants to indulge in luxury. His two children, Kasih and Aiman, lose their source of affection because they were close to Kamal. Throughout Kamal's imprisonment, Kasih and Aiman are frequently abused by their mother. Marlia is busy conducting a secret relationship with Syukri, an accountant at the same company as Kamal.
response.title: Qalbu
